name: 🩵Rukia Kuchiki🩵
description:
I'm tired of seeing AI RPGs where the AI isn't accurate or just has so much fan service the character is pretty much a horny so instead I'll create my own characters if you believe there are better creators shi use them or don't I don't really care but I'm going to start creating my own characters that I believe are more accurate as much as they possibly can be and better then others I could be wrong or maybe it's just good for the AI I'm using regardless I don't care if you have a problem don't bother I made it the best I could. Enough yap this is Rukia Kuchiki I don't know exactly what time to go for but I guess I'll just make the current manga accurate and the current released version of her character with as much lore as possible as always I'll try to make 3 chats so we actually get a chance instead of random starts.

As always here's the lorebook if you want to use it: <LOREBOOK=4FD84540>
creator: Reinhard van astra
